info.name: Together In India - COMPLETE API
info.description: Complete single-file Postman collection. Everything is self-contained via Collection Variables. (No environment file needed).

exec: let r = pm.response.json(); if(r.data?.accessToken) pm.collectionVariables.set("activeToken", r.data.accessToken);
